aries.text: Your usual sprint-through-life approach hits a surprising wall today, and honestly? The pause might be exactly what you need. Someone from your past reaches out with information that reshapes how you've been thinking about a current situation. Take the longer route home and let your mind wander—the best ideas arrive when you're not hunting them down.

taurus.text: That financial decision you've been mulling over? The details finally click into place this afternoon. Venus encourages you to trust both your practical instincts and the flutter of excitement in your chest—they're pointing the same direction for once.

gemini.text: Why does everyone suddenly want your opinion on everything today? Because Mercury sharpens your communication skills to a fine point, making you the go-to problem solver. Just remember to save some mental energy for yourself—you've got your own puzzles to work through too.

cancer.text: Your intuition whispers something important about a relationship situation that logic can't quite explain. The Moon amplifies your already strong emotional radar, so pay attention to what you feel in your body when certain people speak. Cook something nurturing tonight, even if it's just for yourself.

leo.text: Step into the spotlight without apologizing for taking up space—summer is your season and today reminds you why. A creative project gains unexpected traction, but the real win is remembering how good it feels to create for the pure joy of it.

virgo.text: All those small improvements you've been making quietly add up to something noticeable today. Someone finally sees the care you put into the details, and their recognition matters more than you expected it would. Let yourself feel proud—you've earned it.

libra.text: A conversation requires you to pick a side instead of finding the middle ground, and that discomfort is actually growth happening in real time. Your natural diplomacy serves you well, but today rewards clarity over consensus. Text that person back before you overthink it into oblivion.

scorpio.text: Something beneath the surface demands your attention, and you've never been one to shy away from depth. Trust that uncomfortable conversation you've been avoiding—transformation lives on the other side of it. Pluto supports your courage to go there.

sagittarius.text: Your wanderlust gets channeled into planning mode today, and the research phase turns out to be almost as fun as the adventure itself. Jupiter expands your horizons even from your desk chair. Book something, even if it's just a day trip next month—you need something to look forward to.

capricorn.text: Your reputation precedes you in the best possible way today. That steady, reliable energy you bring doesn't go unnoticed, even when you think nobody's paying attention. A professional opportunity appears casual but carries more weight than it first seems.

aquarius.text: Why follow the conventional approach when your brain is practically buzzing with alternative solutions? Uranus activates your innovative streak, making you the person who sees possibilities everyone else missed. Collaborate with someone whose skills complement yours rather than mirror them.

pisces.text: Your boundaries need reinforcing today, and that's not selfish—it's survival. Neptune sometimes blurs where you end and others begin, so be intentional about protecting your energy. An artistic project or creative outlet helps you process emotions that words can't quite capture.

aries.overview: Your energy reaches a peak this week, but the real power comes from knowing when to hold back. That project you've been forcing? It might need a gentler touch than your usual charging-ahead approach.
aries.love: Vulnerability isn't weakness right now—it's actually your secret weapon. Someone close to you is waiting for you to drop the armor, even just a little.
aries.career: You're generating brilliant ideas, but implementation requires collaboration you haven't fully embraced yet. The person whose input you've been dismissing might hold the missing piece.
aries.advice: Channel that fire into listening this week. Your instincts are sharp, but so is someone else's perspective.

taurus.overview: Everything in you wants to dig in and resist the changes swirling around, but summer's asking you to loosen your grip. What you're holding onto so tightly might actually grow better with a little freedom.
taurus.love: Your partner or potential partner is showing you who they are—believe them. Stop rewriting their story to match what you hoped for and see what's actually there.
taurus.career: Financial opportunities look promising, though they'll require you to trust a process that isn't entirely mapped out. Your usual need for guarantees won't serve you here.
taurus.advice: Flexibility isn't the same as losing yourself. Bend a little and notice how much stronger you actually are.

gemini.overview: All those conversations you've been having are finally pointing somewhere specific. Time to stop gathering information and start making decisions based on what you already know.
gemini.love: You've been keeping things light and playful, which works until it doesn't. This week calls for depth—pick one thread and follow it all the way down.
gemini.career: Your versatility is an asset, but spreading yourself across six different projects is diluting your impact. Choose your top two priorities and let the rest wait.
gemini.advice: Commit to something, even temporarily. The fear of missing out is making you miss what's right in front of you.

cancer.overview: Your birthday season brings a surge of clarity about what you actually want versus what you think you should want. The difference between these two things is where your power lives right now.
cancer.love: Home and heart are intertwined for you, and this week illuminates whether your living situation supports your emotional needs. If something feels off, trust that instinct.
cancer.career: You're stepping into a leadership role, whether officially or not, and people are looking to you for emotional intelligence. Your sensitivity is a professional strength, not a liability.
cancer.advice: Stop apologizing for your feelings. They're information, and right now they're telling you something important.

leo.overview: The spotlight finds you naturally, but this week you're discovering that real influence comes from what you do behind the scenes. Your preparation is about to pay off in visible ways.
leo.love: Romance thrives when you stop performing and start being present. The person you're trying to impress is actually more drawn to your unguarded moments.
leo.career: A creative project needs your signature boldness, but with more refinement than you initially planned. Think quality over spectacle for once.
leo.advice: Your warmth is magnetic—use it to build something lasting instead of just collecting applause.

virgo.overview: Your standards are high, which serves you well, but perfectionism is currently blocking progress. This week rewards done over perfect.
virgo.love: You're analyzing a relationship situation that actually requires feeling, not thinking. Put down the mental checklist and notice what your body is telling you.
virgo.career: The details you're obsessing over matter less than the big-picture vision you keep avoiding. Delegate the minutiae and step back to see the whole landscape.
virgo.advice: Good enough is actually good enough this week. Ship it, send it, or say it—stop polishing what's already ready.

libra.overview: Your diplomatic nature usually smooths everything over, but someone in your circle needs honesty more than harmony right now. What you're avoiding saying is exactly what needs to be heard.
libra.love: You've been so focused on maintaining balance that you've lost sight of what you genuinely desire. Wanting something—really wanting it—doesn't make you selfish.
libra.career: A partnership opportunity looks appealing on the surface, but examine the fine print and the power dynamics. Beautiful packaging doesn't always mean solid contents.
libra.advice: Peace at any price is too expensive. Say the hard thing with kindness, and watch what shifts.

scorpio.overview: Your intensity is an asset, but this week asks you to surface from the depths occasionally. Not everything requires investigation—some things can just be enjoyed.
scorpio.love: Trust issues are surfacing, and while your suspicions might be grounded in past experience, they're not necessarily accurate to present reality. Test your assumptions before acting on them.
scorpio.career: You're uncovering information that changes your understanding of a work situation, giving you leverage you didn't have before. Use this power wisely, not vengefully.
scorpio.advice: Transformation doesn't always require destruction. Sometimes evolution is gentler than you expect.

sagittarius.overview: Your optimism is contagious and mostly warranted, but one situation requires more strategic thinking than blind faith. Adventure and planning aren't mutually exclusive.
sagittarius.love: Freedom and commitment are feeling like opposing forces, but they don't have to be. The right relationship expands your world rather than limiting it—make sure you're in one of those.
sagittarius.career: An opportunity to teach, travel, or expand your influence emerges, though it comes with logistics you'd rather not handle. Do the boring work to get to the exciting part.
sagittarius.advice: Your philosophy is solid, but application matters. How can you live your truth in practical, everyday ways?

capricorn.overview: All work and no play has been your mode, and summer is insisting you rebalance. Rest isn't lazy—it's strategic for what you're building long-term.
capricorn.love: You're more emotionally available than usual, which might feel uncomfortable but is actually bringing you closer to what you want. Don't retreat just because feelings are messy.
capricorn.career: Your competence is recognized, possibly with new responsibilities or acknowledgment. Make sure compensation matches the expanded role before you just absorb more work.
capricorn.advice: Success includes joy. Build that into your plan, not as a reward for later, but as fuel for now.

aquarius.overview: Your vision for how things could be is brilliant, but you're disconnected from how things actually are. Ground your innovation in present reality to make it work.
aquarius.love: Emotional availability feels foreign to you, yet it's exactly what a relationship needs from you now. Being different doesn't mean being distant.
aquarius.career: Your unconventional approach is your strength, but collaboration requires some compromise. You can maintain your individuality while playing well with others.
aquarius.advice: The future you're building needs a foundation in today. Connect your ideas to tangible next steps.

pisces.overview: Your imagination is vivid and your intuition sharp, but you're confusing someone else's dream with your own. Take time to distinguish between what you're absorbing and what you actually feel.
pisces.love: Boundaries aren't walls—they're how you maintain yourself while staying connected. You can be compassionate without dissolving into someone else's emotional landscape.
pisces.career: A creative project has real potential, but it needs structure you've been avoiding. Your artistic vision deserves the container that will help it reach people.
pisces.advice: Your empathy is a gift, but martyrdom helps no one. Save yourself first, then extend the life raft.

aries.overview: What if the thing you've been pushing so hard against suddenly gives way? June brings a shift in momentum that rewards your recent efforts, particularly around mid-month when professional doors swing open with surprising ease. This is a season of harvest after months of relentless planting. Your natural fire finds fuel in collaboration rather than solo ventures.
aries.love: Vulnerability becomes your unexpected superpower this month, especially if you've been keeping romantic prospects at arm's length. Single Rams might find chemistry in intellectual spaces—workshops, bookstores, group chats—while partnered Aries discover that admitting uncertainty actually deepens trust.
aries.career: The recognition you receive around the 18th isn't random; it's the culmination of groundwork you laid in early spring. Leadership opportunities arrive with more responsibility than you anticipated, so negotiate terms before accepting. Your ideas have serious traction right now, but they need structure to become reality.
aries.health: Your body is asking for dynamic rest—think yoga instead of bootcamp, swimming instead of running. The intensity you normally crave might deplete you rather than energize you this month. Listen to what feels nourishing rather than what feels like discipline.
aries.advice: Let someone else set the pace occasionally. You'll be surprised how much further you travel when you're not always breaking trail.

taurus.overview: June places you at a creative crossroads, and for once, you're excited rather than anxious about choosing a direction. Financial clarity arrives in the first week, giving you permission to invest in something you've been mentally circling for months. The stability you crave is being rebuilt from the inside out, which feels slower but infinitely more sustainable. Summer's abundance speaks your language fluently.
taurus.love: Romance gets refreshingly straightforward after weeks of mixed signals or internal confusion. If you've been dating someone casually, expect a conversation that defines things one way or another. Committed Bulls find that quality time becomes non-negotiable—and protecting it actually strengthens your bond rather than creating conflict.
taurus.career: A creative project or side interest could generate unexpected income, but only if you take it seriously enough to structure it properly. Your value in the workplace becomes undeniable around the 22nd when someone in leadership explicitly acknowledges what you bring. This is the month to ask for what you're worth, not what you think they'll agree to.
taurus.health: Your nervous system needs earthing—literal contact with grass, soil, or water. Indoor-only days will leave you feeling vaguely depleted without knowing why. Prioritize meals that feel like rituals rather than fuel stops.
taurus.advice: The thing you're holding onto out of loyalty might be holding you back. Examine whether it still serves you or just feels familiar.

gemini.overview: Your birthday season delivers exactly what you've been craving: options, connections, and validation that your ideas aren't as scattered as others have suggested. The first half of June buzzes with social momentum, but pay attention to the quieter second half when integration happens. You're being invited to go deeper rather than wider this month. What you commit to now will still interest you in six months.
gemini.love: Flirtation comes easily, but actual intimacy requires you to stay in the conversation past the witty opener. Someone might call you out for surface-level engagement around the 15th—take it as useful feedback rather than criticism. Partnered Geminis benefit from scheduling adventures that genuinely surprise you both, not just checking boxes on a summer bucket list.
gemini.career: Your communication skills are your currency this month, especially in negotiations or presentations. A project you thought was shelved gets revived with better support and clearer parameters. Multi-tasking will backfire more than usual; single-focus sprints will yield better results than your typical juggling act.
gemini.health: Mental rest is as essential as physical rest, which means scrolling doesn't count as downtime. Your hands need creative outlets—cooking, drawing, building something tangible. Notice if anxiety lives in your jaw or shoulders and address it with deliberate release.
gemini.advice: Not every connection needs to be maintained. Some people are meant for a season, and this month helps you discern which relationships have roots.

cancer.overview: Have you been waiting for permission to prioritize yourself? June hands it to you explicitly, particularly in areas where you've been the perpetual caretaker. The spotlight finds you whether you seek it or not, especially around your work or public contributions. Your intuition is exceptionally sharp right now, bordering on psychic—trust the hunches that arrive without logical explanation. This is your month to receive instead of constantly pouring out.
cancer.love: Emotional honesty becomes magnetic, attracting people who can handle your full depth rather than just your pleasant exterior. A conversation you've been avoiding actually brings relief when you finally initiate it. Single Crabs might feel drawn to someone who needs you less and sees you more—let that be the green flag it is.
cancer.career: Your behind-the-scenes contributions are about to become very visible, possibly through a promotion, public acknowledgment, or expanded role. Financial improvements arrive through negotiation rather than luck, so prepare to advocate for yourself. Creative Cancers find that personal projects gain unexpected traction if shared publicly.
cancer.health: Your emotional weather directly impacts your physical body this month more than usual. Digestive issues or sleep disruption often signal unprocessed feelings. Water—drinking it, bathing in it, being near it—becomes genuinely therapeutic rather than metaphorically soothing.
cancer.advice: Saying no to good things creates space for great things. Your time is the most valuable resource you possess.

leo.overview: June asks you to consider what you're building versus what you're performing. The difference matters more this month than usual, especially as opportunities arise that glitter without offering substance. Your natural charisma is amplified, but so is your ability to discern who's applauding your authentic self versus your entertaining persona. Strategic retreat in the last week of the month isn't weakness—it's preparation for a powerful July.
leo.love: Playfulness returns to romance after a heavier spring, but make sure you're not using charm to avoid real conversations. Someone worth your time will want to know what you fear, not just what you celebrate. Partnered Leos rediscover why you chose each other, often through laughter and shared creativity rather than serious discussion.
leo.career: A leadership role or high-visibility project lands in your lap, but read the fine print before accepting. What looks like a crown might be a burden in disguise. Your creative output is exceptional this month—document ideas even if you can't execute them immediately. Collaboration amplifies your impact, especially with people who complement rather than mirror your skills.
leo.health: Your heart—both literal and metaphorical—needs tending. Cardiovascular exercise feels especially good, as does expressing affection freely. Notice if you're performing wellness for an audience versus actually nourishing yourself. Rest is productive.
leo.advice: Let someone else be the star occasionally. Your security doesn't depend on constant visibility, and stepping back reveals who's truly in your corner.

virgo.overview: The analysis paralysis that's kept you circling certain decisions finally lifts, revealing a clear path forward. June brings relief in the form of information—data you've been waiting for, conversations that clarify confusion, or simply enough perspective to stop second-guessing yourself. Your standards remain high, but your self-criticism softens. Progress doesn't require perfection, and this month proves it.
virgo.love: Overthinking someone's intentions creates distance that honest conversation would immediately close. If you're interested, be direct; if you're uncertain, be honest about that too. Partnered Virgos benefit from lowering the bar for what constitutes quality time—sometimes presence matters more than perfectly planned dates. Let things be easy.
virgo.career: Your organizational skills solve a problem that's been plaguing your team or department, earning you respect and possibly compensation. A work process you've been refining is ready to be shared or implemented on a larger scale. Recognition comes through competence rather than self-promotion, which suits you perfectly. Trust your expertise.
virgo.health: Your gut—literal and intuitive—is trying to tell you something, and June gives you the clarity to finally decode it. Digestive health improves when you address stress rather than just adjusting your diet. Movement that feels meditative serves you better than punishing workouts. Your body is wiser than your mind gives it credit for.
virgo.advice: Done is better than perfect this month. The project you've been polishing endlessly is ready for the world, even if it doesn't feel flawless to you.

libra.overview: What would you choose if people-pleasing wasn't part of the equation? June confronts you with this question repeatedly, especially in situations where your preference directly contradicts someone else's expectations. The discomfort you feel when asserting boundaries is growth, not failure. Your natural diplomacy remains intact, but it's being recalibrated to include yourself in the negotiations. Beauty and balance still matter, but not at the expense of your authenticity.
libra.love: Partnership dynamics shift when you stop managing someone else's emotions and focus on honestly expressing your own. The relationship that can handle your full truth is the one worth keeping. Single Libras attract different types this month—less charming, more substantial—if you're willing to prioritize depth over chemistry. Attraction follows honesty.
libra.career: A collaborative project reveals whether you're working with teammates or people who expect you to carry the weight. Speak up about inequitable distribution of labor before resentment builds. Your aesthetic sensibilities and strategic thinking are both needed for an upcoming initiative—don't minimize either skill set. You're more irreplaceable than you assume.
libra.health: Balance doesn't mean equal—sometimes rest needs to outweigh productivity, or solitude needs to trump socializing. Your kidneys and lower back might signal when you're carrying stress meant for others. Symmetry in your physical practice—yoga, stretching, bilateral movement—helps settle your nervous system.
libra.advice: Disappointing someone occasionally is the price of integrity. The people worth keeping will respect your honesty even when it's inconvenient.

scorpio.overview: You're being asked to release a grudge, habit, or story that's been providing identity but preventing evolution. June's intensity matches yours, which means transformation happens whether you consciously participate or get dragged along. The control you've maintained in one area might need to loosen for growth to occur elsewhere. Trust is the work this month—in others, in process, and especially in your own resilience. What you survive only makes you more yourself.
scorpio.love: Jealousy or possessiveness that surfaces isn't the problem—it's information about unmet needs or old wounds. Address the root instead of managing the symptoms. Single Scorpios might experience magnetic attraction around the 20th, but pay attention to whether it's chemistry or familiarity with intensity. Partnered Scorpios deepen intimacy by sharing power rather than wielding it.
scorpio.career: Your research, intuition, or investigative skills uncover something valuable that others have overlooked. A power dynamic at work shifts in your favor, but wield influence with integrity rather than revenge. Financial opportunities improve, especially through joint ventures or resources you share with others. Your strategic mind is unmatched right now—use it.
scorpio.health: What you've been avoiding looking at directly is affecting your wellbeing more than you've admitted. Physical symptoms often have emotional roots for you—explore both. Elimination—of toxins, relationships, habits—supports your vitality. Water purifies you literally and energetically this month.
scorpio.advice: Forgiveness isn't about them; it's about refusing to let the past colonize your future. What you release creates space for what you actually want.

sagittarius.overview: When was the last time you stayed somewhere long enough to see what blooms? June slows your typical pace, which might feel restrictive initially but reveals depth you'd miss at your usual speed. Commitments that once felt like cages could be reframed as containers for growth. Your optimism remains intact, but it's being tempered with realism that actually makes your visions more achievable. Expansion happens through depth this month, not distance.
sagittarius.love: Someone wants more consistency than you've been offering, and the conversation is worth having even if it feels binding. Freedom within relationship is possible, but it requires negotiation and honesty. Single Archers benefit from slowing down the getting-to-know-you phase—don't skip chapters to get to the exciting parts. Depth creates its own kind of adventure.
sagittarius.career: A learning opportunity or teaching role expands your influence beyond your current scope. Your big-picture thinking solves a problem that's had others stuck in details. International connections or diverse perspectives fuel your best work this month. If you've been considering additional education or certification, June provides clarity about whether it's expansion or avoidance.
sagittarius.health: Your hips, thighs, and liver need attention—stretching, movement, and moderation in indulgence. Outdoor activity feeds your soul more than gym workouts. Notice if restlessness is masking the need for internal exploration rather than external adventure. Sometimes the journey is inward.
sagittarius.advice: Commitment isn't confinement when it's chosen consciously. What you dedicate yourself to fully will take you further than what you sample superficially.

capricorn.overview: The structure you've been building finally feels stable enough to relax into rather than constantly reinforce. June rewards your discipline with tangible results—the promotion, the recognition, the financial improvement you've been working toward. But the invitation is also to enjoy what you've created instead of immediately identifying the next mountain to climb. Success includes satisfaction, not just achievement. Let yourself feel proud.
capricorn.love: Vulnerability doesn't come naturally, but someone's patience with your slow thaw deserves acknowledgment and reciprocation. Letting someone support you isn't weakness—it's partnership. Single Goats attract potential partners through competence and presence rather than pursuit. Committed Capricorns rediscover playfulness when you stop treating the relationship like another responsibility to manage.
capricorn.career: Your authority and expertise are unquestionable right now, positioning you for advancement or expanded responsibility. A long-term project reaches a milestone that validates your strategy and effort. Delegate what doesn't require your specific skillset—your time is too valuable to spend on tasks others can handle. Leadership suits you, but make sure the climb is toward something you actually want.
capricorn.health: Your bones, joints, and teeth need attention—structural support through movement, nutrition, and rest. Chronic tension in your jaw or neck signals unspoken stress. Your body has carried you through relentless effort; treat it with the same respect you give your work. Rest is an investment, not an indulgence.
capricorn.advice: Ambition serves you, but don't let it become the only thing that defines you. Who you are matters more than what you accomplish.

aquarius.overview: Your innovative ideas finally find the audience and support they deserve, but collaboration requires compromise you haven't had to make when working solo. June tests whether you can maintain your vision while incorporating others' contributions. The community you've been seeking might already surround you if you let people in past the intellectual connection. Belonging doesn't require conformity—it requires presence. Show up as yourself.
aquarius.love: Emotional availability feels awkward but necessary if you want connection that's more than friendship with attraction. Someone might push for definition or commitment that triggers your independence reflex—examine whether it's genuine incompatibility or fear of losing autonomy. Partnered Aquarians benefit from scheduled spontaneity, which sounds contradictory but actually works for you. Create containers for connection.
aquarius.career: Your unconventional approach to a common problem positions you as an innovator worth listening to. Technology, networking, or group initiatives amplify your impact beyond individual effort. A collaborative project succeeds when you balance vision with flexibility. Your ideas need others to become reality, and others need your ideas to break through stagnation.
aquarius.health: Your nervous system and circulation benefit from practices that ground you—breath work, earthing, reducing screen time. Your mind moves faster than your body can sustain; create buffers between stimulation. Community wellness activities serve you better than solo pursuits this month. Connection is medicine.
aquarius.advice: Detachment serves you, but don't mistake it for superiority. The people around you have wisdom that complements your innovation—listen more than you lecture.

pisces.overview: Dream and reality find unexpected alignment this month when something you've been visualizing begins taking concrete form. June asks you to participate actively in manifestation rather than waiting for the universe to deliver without your effort. Your intuition is exceptionally accurate, but it needs pairing with practical action to create results. Boundaries—those structures you've historically resisted—actually protect your energy for what matters most. Magic requires embodiment.
pisces.love: Fantasy and reality need integration if you want sustainable romance. Someone might not match the story you've created about them, which is either disappointing or liberating depending on your perspective. Single Pisces benefit from clarity about what you need versus what you think you should want. Partnered Fish deepen intimacy through honest conversation about expectations that haven't been voiced.
pisces.career: Your creative or healing gifts generate opportunities that require business savvy to capitalize on. Artistic work needs structure to reach beyond your immediate circle. A mentor or advisor provides practical guidance that grounds your vision without diminishing it. Money follows value, but only if you're willing to name your worth and ask for it.
pisces.health: Your feet, immune system, and sleep patterns need attention and consistency. Escapism through substances, screens, or fantasy depletes rather than restores you. Water heals you, but so does earth—combine them if possible. Your sensitivity is a gift when bounded, but without protection, it becomes overwhelm.
pisces.advice: Spiritual bypassing keeps you safe but small. True growth requires engaging with reality, not just transcending it.
